title: mimulus inflatus
intro: Mimulus inflatus, also known as Skyrocket or Monkey Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat anxiety and stress due to its adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Mimulus inflatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve mood. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
